patches.summary: Added an official-CLI-style dynamic run surface with schema help, project aliases, prompt shorthand, typed key-value inputs, pricing, waits, and downloads.
patches.reason: WaveSpeed model IDs are slash-delimited dynamic paths with per-model schemas, so a generated static endpoint wrapper cannot provide the official model-run ergonomics by itself.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./...; dry-run run and price smokes; live price-only smoke for google/nano-banana/Seedance-family model inputs

patches.summary: Added media upload/download helpers and media input shorthands for image and video generation workflows.
patches.reason: Nano Banana edit, Seedance, Kling, and Veo workflows commonly require local reference images or videos to be uploaded and passed as model input URLs.
patches.validated_outcome: Dry-run Seedance image-to-video upload coercion and Kling element_list JSON file parsing passed.

patches.summary: Added model search/filter ergonomics and official-style aliases for common account/history commands.
patches.reason: WaveSpeed users need to discover fast-changing model families and recognize official CLI command names while keeping the generated endpoint commands available.
patches.validated_outcome: models z-image --json returned filtered live catalog results; publish verify passed.

patches.summary: Hardened custom run input aliases and raw media transfer paths after public-library review.
patches.reason: The hand-authored run surface needed separate --set backing storage and custom upload/download requests needed to honor configured client rate limiting, timeout, and credential-validation policy.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./... passed after the publish-review fixes, including mixed --set/--input-kv and echoed-input URL filtering.

patches.summary: Split the store into archive (sync-cache) and library (D2C content) DBs with independent version domains; added OpenLibrary, migrateLibrary, and library tables/indexes/FTS5.
patches.reason: The novel content-production layer needs its own persistent tables versioned independently of the generated sync-cache schema.
patches.validated_outcome: Schema migration test creates archive.db and library.db with independent user_version domains; FTS5 prompt search returns expected results.

patches.summary: Added shared Shot type, AgentEnvelope, brand-merge precedence resolver, record-policy resolver, cost/balance helpers, and shotlist IO in novel_common.go; extracted submitAndAwait from run.go and added run --record.
patches.reason: All novel commands operate on one canonical Shot schema and emit a uniform envelope; submitAndAwait gives a no-prints structured generation chain reusable across commands.
patches.validated_outcome: submitAndAwait_test proves structured-data/no-prints/failed-prediction-not-error; brand precedence and record-policy unit tests pass.

patches.summary: Added the IG/TikTok/Facebook/X platform request-shape table (dimensions, duration caps, manifest slots).
patches.reason: pack, qa preflight, and the image-dimension validator need a single source of truth for per-platform output shapes.

patches.summary: Added plan brief-to-shotlist (hybrid deterministic/LLM planner), model-pick, and cost-estimate.
patches.reason: Agents need to shape briefs into structured shotlists and price them before producing.

patches.summary: Added pack: multi-platform producer with concurrency, cost ceiling, on-failure policy, history/clean, mutable-latest layout, per-platform manifests, and stdlib image-dimension validation.
patches.reason: The core produce command that turns one concept into a post-ready, manifest-bearing pack.

patches.summary: Added batch: submit many prompts from CSV/JSON with spend ceiling and fail-fast/fail-tolerant semantics.
patches.reason: Bulk production with cost control and partial-failure recording.

patches.summary: Added variants: seed/style/model sweep off a base shot with side-by-side metadata.
patches.reason: Comparative generation so an agent can pick the best output.

patches.summary: Added compose: explicit step pipeline with step-to-step wiring and rollback of later steps on failure.
patches.reason: Multi-stage workflows (text->image->upscale->video) need ordered chaining with completed-step recording.

patches.summary: Added aspects (re-frame with outpaint or anchored re-render fallback) and restyle (brand/style img2img).
patches.reason: Refine existing assets into platform ratios and brand styling.

patches.summary: Added library list/search/show/tag/export/cost-report over the library DB.
patches.reason: Agents need to query and roll up the recorded generation history.

patches.summary: Added qa preflight with pass/warn/fail verdicts over balance, model availability, prompt safety, platform request-shape, and brand coverage.
patches.reason: Catch production problems (e.g. an IG reel above the 90s cap) before spending.

patches.summary: Added brand init/show/list/apply/edit with a non-interactive primary path and a narrow TTY-only interactive gate; brand profiles auto-merge into produce/refine and run.
patches.reason: Brand profiles centralize style anchors, palette, negative prompts, models, and platforms for consistent D2C output.

patches.summary: Hardened run --download so completed prediction payloads print before download attempts and CDN downloads do not receive API credentials.
patches.reason: WaveSpeed completed predictions can include public CDN outputs plus API management URLs; attaching credentials to CDN requests or failing before printing the paid result loses the successful generation URL.
patches.validated_outcome: Regression tests cover positional --download path parsing, CDN downloads without Authorization, skipped prediction management URLs, and non-fatal post-success download warnings.
